content.problemStatement:
**B**.You are building a new user registration system and need to ensure that users create strong passwords. Your task is to write a program that validates a given password based on a set of security rules.

A password is considered "Strong" if it satisfies all of the following conditions:


It must be at least 8 characters long.
It must contain at least one digit (0-9).
It must contain at least one uppercase letter (A-Z).
It must contain at least one special character from the set: `!`, `@`, `#`, `$`, `%`.
If any of these conditions are not met, the password is considered "Weak".


Input Format
A single line containing a string `P`, the password to be checked.



Output Format
Print "Strong" if the password meets all the criteria, otherwise print "Weak".
